disclaimer: OpenMP is a non-profit community project dedicated to the preservation of Minions Paradise. This project is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by Electronic Arts (EA), Illumination Entertainment, or Universal Studios. All game assets are used for educational and preservation purposes under fair use. This project involves a clean-room decompilation effort to ensure the game remains playable after official servers have shut down. We do not want to make profit, we just want this game to not fall into the abyss of the forgotten games.
